name: campaign-monitor
description: Reads and writes Campaign Monitor clients, campaigns, subscriber lists, subscribers, segments, and templates through the createsend.com v3.3 REST API.

risk.read: external Campaign Monitor API read of client, campaign, subscriber, segment, and template data
risk.write: external mutation of Campaign Monitor lists, subscribers (add/update/unsubscribe/delete), segments, and draft campaigns; sending a campaign delivers real email to real recipients
risk.approval: required for campaign-send and subscriber-delete actions; list/segment/subscriber-add/update mutations are lower risk
